hero.body: Software Engineer specializing in scalable cloud solutions, delivery automation, and platform engineering. Building resilient systems on GCP with Kubernetes, automating infrastructure, and implementing DevSecOps practices for high-availability platforms.

projects.title: DICE Monolith
projects.subtitle: DISTRIBUTED COMPUTING ENGINE
projects.desc: A distributed computing engine for large-scale data processing with automated scaling, fault tolerance, and multi-cloud deployment capabilities.

projects.title: Hawkeye
projects.subtitle: OBSERVABILITY & MONITORING PLATFORM
projects.desc: Full-stack observability platform with custom metrics collection, alerting rules, and automated incident response for cloud-native applications.

projects.title: StateLedger
projects.subtitle: STATE MANAGEMENT FOR DISTRIBUTED SYSTEMS
projects.desc: Consistent state management system using Raft consensus for distributed applications with strong consistency guarantees and automatic failover.

projects.title: UltraCache
projects.subtitle: HIGH-PERFORMANCE DISTRIBUTED CACHE
projects.desc: Ultra-fast distributed caching layer with consistent hashing, automatic sharding, and sub-millisecond latency for high-throughput applications.

experience.desc: Building scalable cloud platforms on GCP with Kubernetes, implementing CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure automation with Terraform, and establishing DevSecOps practices for enterprise applications.
